SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SPA") is made and entered into as of the 15th day of October, 2023.

PARTIES:

1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Lane, Singapore 238800, and reachable at +65 6123 4567 or emily.tan@example.sg.

2. Mr. John Lim, NRIC No. S3456789C, residing at 456 Raffles Avenue, Singapore 039800. Contact number: +65 6234 5678, email: john.lim@sample.sg.

3. Future Tech Pte. Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN 202345678A, having its registered office at 789 Marina Bay Drive, Singapore 018900.

The SPA details the terms of the shareholders' agreement including but not limited to capital contributions, which shall not exceed SGD 500,000. 

It is expressly stated that this document does not constitute a project plan or assume any project status. Any reference to specific roles or responsibilities shall not imply a commitment beyond what is detailed herein.

For more information, visit: https://contracts.example.sg/shareholder-agreement/S3456789C.
